name: eod-analysis-ctx
description: End-of-day market analysis using context-saver batch execution. Consolidates account, positions, orders, and movers into a single filtered response.

commands.intent: all positions with PnL and daily change

steps.command: python3 scripts/ctx_session.py log --type eod_analysis --priority high --data '{"type": "eod", "completed": true}'

steps.comment: Save session state at end of day

steps.command: python3 scripts/notify.py send --to user --priority high --subject 'EOD Analysis' --body 'See pipeline output'
